projectDescription: A corporate web management portal built with ASP.NET Core Razor Pages that provides secure user authentication, role-based access control, and CRUD administration of profiles, users, modules, and permissions.
keyFeatures: JWT-based authentication with Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA protection
Cookie-based session management with 1-hour sliding expiration
Role-based access control with fine-grained per-action permissions (agregar, editar, eliminar, consultar, detalle)
Full CRUD management for Modules, Profiles, Users, and Profile Permissions
Dynamic navigation menu that adapts based on user claims and permissions
Neumorphic UI design built on Bootstrap 5 with Bootstrap Icons
Backend API integration via a centralized ApiService with Bearer token injection
User profile page with avatar and personal details from the API
Server-side permission checks enforced on every page load
Client-side input sanitization and validation on forms
publicApiSurface: POST api/auth — Login, returns JWT token
GET api/Usuario — List all users (filtered by name, profile, state)
PUT api/Usuario/{id} — Update user profile and avatar
GET api/Usuario/mi-perfil — Get current user's profile
GET api/permisoperfil/{idPerfil} — Get permissions for a profile
